questions.question: According to 14 CFR Part 48, when must a person register a small Unmanned Aircraft with the Federal Aviation Administration?

choices.text: All civilian small UAS weighing greater than .55 pounds must be registered regardless of its intended use.
When the small UA is used for any purpose other than as a model aircraft.
Only when the operator will be paid for commercial services.

questions.question: According to 14 CFR Part 48, a Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS) must be registered to its owner unless ...

choices.text: The owner is under 13 years of age.
The owner is over 13 years of age.
The owner has a medical condition preventing them from registering.

questions.question: You have how many days to update your registration information if it changes:
The registration certificate on your UAS is good for
The registration number issued by the FAA must be readily accessible and visible upon inspection. It can be inside a compartment if

choices.text: the compartment can be accessed without tools
the compartment has a window allowing you to see into it
The compartment is sealed with tape

questions.question: According to 14CFR Part 89, commercial drone operators must comply with Remote ID only if ...

choices.text: All commercial operators, regardless of drone size, must comply.
If they are flying a drone greater than .55 pounds.
If they are operating outside of a recognized remote ID area.
